In fact, one of the remixed versions of my succubus prompt on PlaygroundAI had exactly that adjustment—the term succubus was replaced with demon woman. Now, here is the Illustrious XL version of the piece. The original image had an issue with the number of fingers, and upon upscaling, the hands were rendered incorrectly. So for this version, I only applied Adetailer without additional upscaling
